goal: freeze the next same-mainline longrun after runtime-watch locator integrity so the active Codex operator line can continue family parity and autopilot continuity work without inventing a new product line

ordered_tranches.goal: align the current stable families on one shared governance-surface contract while keeping family-specific delivery differences explicit
make the current auto-only runtime expose one machine-readable stop/continue/retry reason language across the stable families without widening formal entry
freeze one continuous closeout-evidence path for the current stable families so longrun auto execution can stop on the same auditable summaries and gates

hard_boundaries: do not add a new family or overlay
do not rewrite xiaohongshu into direct-delivery
do not activate academic poster contracts
do not promote managed web runtime into current repo truth
do not widen formal entry beyond CLI plus MCP
do not collapse RedCube into OPL federation runtime ownership
required_verification: node --test tests/runtime-alignment-p0.test.ts tests/phase-2-runtime-watch-locator-integrity-hardening.test.ts tests/phase-2-family-parity-governance-surface-convergence.test.ts tests/deliverable-review-loop.test.ts tests/runtime-deliverable-route.test.ts tests/phase-2-behavior-convergence.test.ts tests/mcp-gateway.test.ts tests/cli-v2-smoke.test.ts
